$comment: c21 (D-CSUBSET-VOLATILE-QUALIFIER): the volatile LOCAL-object pin. main() reads a volatile local across a re-assign and returns 42. Mem2Reg refuses to promote a volatile alloca, so the loads/store stay memory ops through the RELEASE optimizer; this pins that a volatile local lowers + optimizes + runs correctly (the end-to-end companion to the MIR-tier 'volatile Load survives Mem2Reg' test). No stdout (libc-free); exit code only. arm64-elf runs under qemu.
